items.title: Were Arsenal right to be 'fuming' with refereeing after Atletico draw?
items.summary: Mikel Arteta was left "fuming" with the officials after Arsenal's draw at Atletico Madrid - what did they get right and wrong?

items.title: Arteta hard na optreden Makkelie: 'Dit is onacceptabel op dit niveau'
items.summary: Danny Makkelie leidde woensdagavond het heenduel tussen Atlético Madrid en Arsenal in de halve finale van de Champions League, maar beleefde op zijn zachtst gezegd een ongelukkige avond. De Nederlandse arbiter pakte een hoofdrol door de bal drie keer op de stip te leggen, maar werd één keer teruggefloten. Arsenal-manager Mikel Arteta had na afloop weinig goede woorden voor Makkelie. 'Ik ben erg van streek.'

items.title: Griezmann geniet optimaal van laatste CL-avond in Madrid: 'Finale is mijn droom'
items.summary: Het gelijkspel met Arsenal was voor Antoine Griezmann de laatste Champions League-wedstrijd in het Estadio Metropolitano en dat wilde de afzwaaiende Fransman ten volste waarderen, zo bleek al vlak voor de aftrap.

items.title: Arsenal 'hunt' Man City - what 7-0 win means for WSL title race
items.summary: Arsenal have made up ground on Manchester City, but can they actually win the Women's Super League title this season?

items.title: Farioli lacht: Sporting verspeelt in extremis dure punten tegen laagvlieger
items.summary: Woensdagavond speelden Atlético Madrid en Arsenal tegen elkaar in de halve finale van de Champions League. Danny Makkelie had een hoofdrol tijdens deze wedstrijd, die te volgen was in de VI Live. Lees terug hoe alles verliep.

items.title: De Boer hekelt strafschop voor Atlético: 'Kan daar zo kwaad om worden'
items.summary: De penalty die Atlético Madrid woensdag kreeg in de halve finale van de Champions League maakt de tongen los. Arsenal-verdediger Ben White kreeg de bal via zijn eigen been op de arm, waarna Danny Makkelie naar de stip wees. Het moment leidt tot de nodige onbegrip bij Ronald de Boer.

items.title: Gyökeres and Alvarez on spot as VAR controversy denies Arsenal at Atlético
items.summary: It was a see-saw tie, a tale of three penalties; two scored, one by each team and a third given and then taken away, the most dramatic momentum shift inside a couple of minutes towards the end, the incident that stood to redefine the tie suddenly rubbed out. It was a night when the controversy pulsed and if it lacked the beauty of Paris Saint-Germain versus Bayern Munich from the other Champions League semi-final first-leg it still had drama; knife-edge tension. Continue reading...

items.title: Hoe Atlético na rust openingen vond tegen Arsenal
items.summary: Atlético Madrid heeft zich terug geknokt van een achterstand tegen Arsenal: 1-1. Tactische analyse van een wedstrijd waarin Atlético na rust ruimtes begon te herkennen tegen Arsenal.

items.title: Blackstenius and Holmberg doubles fire Arsenal to 7-0 WSL win over Leicester
items.summary: Arsenal condemned a broken Leicester to a bottom-place finish in the WSL and kept the pressure on Manchester City at the top with a dominant win. Two goals each from Sweden’s Smilla Holmberg and Stina Blackstenius and one apiece from Frida Maanum, Mariona Caldentey and Leah Williamson, helped Arsenal reduce their goal-difference deficit with the league leaders from 13 to six. “I’m so happy,” said the Arsenal head coach, Renée Slegers. “We wanted to win today, we needed to win today, so we did that … What’s most pleasing to see is that we play the Arsenal way and that doesn’t change regardless of who’s on the pitch. Everyone’s contributing.” Continue reading...

items.title: PSG and Bayern’s box-fresh talents or Premier League title tussle: you can only have one | Barney Ronay
items.summary: The Premier League isn’t as fun and fizzy as PSG v Bayern but that’s the price of the twice-weekly churn that rewards discipline and sacrifice In the novel Rabbit, Run, John Updike has one of his characters, a groovy and progressive 1960s priest, calling round to talk to his fellow minister, a hard German Lutheran, about the secret doubts he harbours about his faith. Is the doctrine really necessary? Is hell just, you know, a metaphor? He likes Jesus. But maybe he also likes sinful things, like sex and recklessly open attacking football. The hard German Lutheran takes one look, curls his lip and tells the groovy progressive priest to get down on his knees in the kitchen and beg for forgiveness. Who is he to reason with divine suffering? Life is pain. Joy is pain. Pain is pain. Frankly, the groovy priest who likes flying full-backs and an open midfield disgusts him. He will burn in hell for his spineless debauchery. The groovy priest leaves in tears. Continue reading...

items.title: PSG's Hakimi out of Bayern return leg with injury
items.summary: Paris St‑Germain full-back Achraf Hakimi has been ruled out for the "next few weeks" after suffering an injury during their dramatic win against Bayern Munich in the Champions League.

items.title: Football Leaks hacker Rui Pinto acquitted of 241 counts in second Portuguese trial
items.summary: Case dismissed after court rules the charges were ‘invalid’ 37-year-old had been accused of illegally accessing emails Rui Pinto, the hacker behind the Football Leaks revelations that exposed dodgy dealings in world football, was acquitted on Wednesday of all charges in a second Portuguese trial, despite having previously been convicted for similar offences. The 37-year-old had been on trial since January 2025 over 241 alleged counts of illegally accessing email accounts belonging to several Portuguese sports bodies, including Benfica, and law firms, magistrates and the tax authority. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea forward Mykhailo Mudryk appeals to Cas against reported four-year ban
items.summary: Ukrainian has not played since November 2024 Cas confirms appeal by Mudryk against the FA The Chelsea forward Mykhailo Mudryk has appealed to the court of arbitration for sport after he received a reported four-year playing ban from the Football Association for the use of a banned substance. Mudryk has not played a competitive match since November 2024 after he failed a drug test while on international duty with Ukraine and began a provisional suspension. Under the terms of any four-year ban he would not be eligible for selection again until December 2028, but if an appeal to Cas were successful then the 25-year-old could possibly return next year. Continue reading...

items.title: Liverpool expect Salah return before end of season
items.summary: Liverpool expect Mohamed Salah to return from injury before the end of the season after he was forced off against Crystal Palace on Saturday.

items.title: Chelsea's Mudryk appeals against four-year FA ban
items.summary: Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk takes his fight against a Football Association drugs ban to the Court of Arbitration for Sport.

items.title: Moins de spectacle, tout autant de suspens : l'Atletico Madrid et Arsenal se neutralisent
items.summary: L'Atlético Madrid et Arsenal se sont rendus coup pour coup dans un match bien moins spectaculaire que celui de la veille.

items.title: Géén negen doelpunten, wél spanning: Atlético Madrid en Arsenal FC hebben alles nog in eigen handen
items.summary: Na het spektakelstuk van gisteren in het Parc des Princes stond vanavond de tweede halve finale in de Champions League op het menu. Atlético Madrid en Arsenal FC hielden elkaar in evenwicht.

items.title: Herhaalt Anderlecht het Simic-succes? 'Deze speler wordt alvast gevolgd door Duitse en Italiaanse clubs'
items.summary: RSC Anderlecht zal in het tussenseizoen een gedaanteverwisseling ondergaan. Sommige spelers moéten vertrekken, terwijl anderen voor geld in het laatje kunnen zorgen. Mihajlo Cvetkovic behoort tot die laatste categorie.

items.title: Mauvais signe pour la Coupe du Monde ? L'Iran quitte le congrès de la FIFA, furieux
items.summary: On ignore encore si l'équipe nationale d'Iran se rendra aux USA pour disputer la Coupe du Monde, même si le timing devient de plus en plus serré pour lui choisir un éventuel remplaçant. Mais un incident ayant eu lieu en marge du congrès de la FIFA incite au pessimisme.

items.title: Dans les coulisses d'un traumatisme : un documentaire sur le scandale de Knysna bientôt publié sur Netflix
items.summary: Il y a plus de 15 ans, le football français vivait l'un de ses épisodes les plus noirs : le scandale de Knysna. Lors de la Coupe du Monde 2010, les Bleus se ridiculisaient sous les yeux de la planète entière.

items.title: Doorgestuurd in Spanje, Duitsland én Frankrijk: Arthur Vermeeren kan zich géén foute keuze meer veroorloven
items.summary: Arthur Vermeeren moet voor de vierde keer in drie jaar zijn koffers pakken. Enig probleem: ook RB Leipzig zit niet te wachten op onze landgenoot. Waar kan hij heen?

items.title: Doorbraak is nabij: 'Kevin Mac Allister op weg van Union naar de Premier League'
items.summary: Kevin Mac Allister gaat Union SG op het einde van het seizoen verlaten. De Argentijnse verdediger heeft enkele aanbiedingen uit de Premier League op zak.

items.title: Ca peut aider Vincent Kompany : le PSG sera privé d'un joueur très important au retour
items.summary: La demi-finale allez de Ligue des Champions entre le PSG et le Bayern Munich a tenu toutes ses promesses, et plus encore. Les deux équipes se sont livrées un duel épique, mais un cadre parisien manquera le match retour.

items.title: Il a tenu parole : un Bosnien a bien offert une bière à toute la ville après la qualification contre l'Italie!
items.summary: Ermedin Demirovic avait fait une promesse : payer une bière à chaque supporter du Vfb Stuttgart, son club, en cas de qualification de la Bosnie-Herzégovine pour la Coupe du Monde 2026. Et il s'y est tenu !

items.title: Recordbedrag in zicht: WK-winnaar mag deze gigantische som bijschrijven
items.summary: Het WK komt met rasse schreden dichterbij. FIFA kondigt het wereldkampioenschap van komende zomer aan als het grootste, beste én duurste ooit. En de wereldvoetbalbond heeft beslist om er nog wat extra geld tegenaan te gooien.

items.title: Penalty drama reigns as Arsenal draw with Atletico Madrid
items.summary: Mikel Arteta was left fuming after Arsenal had a penalty controversially overturned following a VAR check in a pulsating 1-1 draw with Atletico Madrid in their Champions League semi-final first leg.

items.title: 'Completely unacceptable' - Arteta slams Eze penalty decision
items.summary: Mikel Arteta called the decision to overturn a penalty awarded to Eberechi Eze as "completely unacceptable" after his Arsenal side were pegged back to draw 1-1 in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final with Atletico Madrid.

items.title: World Snooker Championship scores and schedule
items.summary: The 2026 World Snooker Championship continues in Sheffield, with defending champion Zhao Xintong knocked out by Shaun Murphy.

items.title: The influence of Super League half-backs: Which partnership is on top?
items.summary: When teams are riding high, on a run of form, or 'clicking', there are two players on the field that get looked at more than most - the ones starting at No 6 and No 7.

items.title: Golf leaderboards: PGA Tour's Cadillac Championship, LPGA, DP World Tour and more
items.summary: All the latest golf scores and results from around the world, including the PGA Tour's Cadillac Championship, LPGA's Riviera Maya Open and DP World Tour's Turkish Airlines Open.
